categories.name: Accessibility & Compliance
categories.description: Skills that check accessibility, policy, risk, security-sensitive content, or other institutional compliance concerns.

categories.name: Security & Data Protection
categories.description: Skills that classify, protect, audit, or remediate sensitive data and security-sensitive workflows.

categories.name: Brand & Communications
categories.description: Skills that help UC San Diego materials follow brand, tone, messaging, visual identity, and communications guidance.

categories.name: Campus AI Tools
categories.description: Skills for TritonAI, coding-agent setup, campus AI tool selection, feedback, and user support workflows.

categories.name: Data & Workflow Automation
categories.description: Skills for evaluating, designing, troubleshooting, or documenting data pipelines and operational automations.

categories.name: Knowledge & Documentation
categories.description: Skills that organize, summarize, maintain, or improve internal knowledge, references, and documentation.

categories.name: Business Operations
categories.description: Skills for procurement, finance-adjacent workflows, approvals, service operations, and administrative process support.

categories.name: Meetings & Projects
categories.description: Skills that turn meeting context, planning notes, and project discussions into useful follow-up work.

categories.name: Engineering Support
categories.description: Skills for repository review, implementation guidance, code quality checks, release preparation, and developer workflows.
